task: Ralph R13 (2026-05-15): close R12 carry-overs + retest dev for any new bugs surfaced after R12 deploy. Rate limits stay OFF on dodev; NO security weakening. Sonnet for testing, Opus for root cause + fix. Commit, push, deploy to dodev. Never bind 0.0.0.0. Never touch prod.
